description: Hierarchical composition from parent to child
example: Offshore Production Hub A contains Gas Processing Area
Production Well W01 locatedIn Reservoir Alpha

description: Well or completion produces from a reservoir object
example: Completion C01 producesFrom Reservoir Compartment A1

description: Injection well injects into reservoir zone or compartment
example: Water Injection Well W11 injectsInto Reservoir Zone Z1

description: Process flow from one asset unit or equipment item to another
example: Inlet Separator flowsTo Oil Processing Train

description: Material energy or utility feed relationship
example: Crude Charge Pump feeds Fired Heater
Electric Motor M101 drives Pump P101

description: Instrument or tag measures an asset component or process variable
example: Pressure Sensor PT101 measures Separator Pressure

description: Asset has one or more real-time telemetry points
Control loop or actuator controls a process variable or asset state
example: Flow Controller FIC101 controls Control Valve FV101

description: Safety or control system protects an asset area or unit
example: Safety Instrumented System protects Fired Heater

description: Asset class or instance is associated with a possible failure mode
Asset unit or business object contributes to a KPI
example: Gas Compression Train hasKPI Compression Efficiency

description: Telemetry asset or control condition generates an event
example: High Vibration Tag generatesEvent Vibration Alarm
